event: Spring flood with bare trees reflected in water
description: A vertical landscape showing bare deciduous trees standing in floodwater during early spring. The dark, intricate silhouettes of the leafless trees are perfectly reflected in the still water below, creating a symmetrical composition. Patches of snow and golden-brown grass are visible on the banks beyond. The sky is pale and overcast. The palette is muted with browns, grays, and subtle golden tones. The overall effect is quiet and contemplative.
